description: Predominantly Hispanic street gang based in Chicago, Illinois, founded in 1966 as a Humboldt Park baseball club. They are part of the Folks Alliance and are involved in drug trafficking, assault, auto theft, robbery, homicide, money laundering, and weapons trafficking. The gang has an estimated 7,500-10,000 members and operates across multiple U.S. states.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: Chicago metropolitan area , Ohio , Quad Cities , Boston , Wisconsin , Michigan , Indiana , Tennessee , Texas , New York and Florida .
country_links.context: The organization has territory in multiple U.S. states including Ohio, Boston, Wisconsin, Michigan, Indiana, Tennessee, Texas, New York, and Florida.
